node.name: Shopaholic
node.description: An E-Commerce site which has been built using Node.js and React. This project has 3 APIs: E-Commerce API, Bank API and Supplier API. Users pay the E-Commerce and E-Commerce pays the supplier through Bank API. E-Commerce pass an order to the suppliers and asks the supplier to deliver the product to the shipping address through Supplier API.

node.name: Brevity
node.description: Brevity is a blog site for experience and resource sharing. Experienced people can share their knowledge and the difficulties they faced while learning a particular topic. Beginners can ask for resources and seek help from experts.

node.name: Design-Patterns-Java
node.description: Design patterns are typical solutions to common problems in software design. Each pattern is like a blueprint that you can customize to solve a particular design problem in your code.
